itinerary.title: The Narita Landing
itinerary.description: Immediate rest after an 11-hour flight. Omotesando offers a traditional feel right next to the airport.
itinerary.toddlerTip: Naritasan Park is huge and perfect for stretching little legs after a long flight.

activities.name: Naritasan Park
activities.reason: Massive park with koi ponds, ideal for toddlers to burn off energy.

activities.name: Narita Omotesando
activities.reason: Traditional street with fun snacks like 'unagi-pan' and fresh gelato.

activities.name: Kuriyama Park
activities.reason: Features a mini steam locomotive that kids can see up close.

itinerary.title: The Big City Start
itinerary.description: Shinjuku is the departure point for the Odakyu Romancecar, making your first transit leg very simple.
itinerary.toddlerTip: Staying in Shinjuku puts you near Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden, perfect for jet lag recovery.

activities.name: Shinjuku Gyoen
activities.reason: Massive green space perfect for toddlers to run around and burn off energy.

activities.name: Asobōno!
activities.reason: The ultimate indoor playground with ball pits and climbing structures.

activities.name: teamLab Borderless
activities.reason: Immersive digital art at Azabudai Hills. Features the Forest of Resonating Lamps.

activities.name: Robot Park
activities.reason: Outdoor slides and robot-themed equipment in Roppongi Hills.

activities.name: Tokyo Disneyland
activities.reason: The happiest place on earth, with toddler-friendly rides and magical parades.

activities.name: Playground Shibuya Kids
activities.reason: Clean, reservation-only indoor play area in the heart of Shibuya.

activities.name: Shibuya Scramble
activities.reason: Iconic crossing. Experience the organized chaos of Tokyo's busiest intersection.

activities.name: Yoyogi Park
activities.reason: Spacious park near Meiji Shrine, ideal for toddlers to run on expansive lawns.

activities.name: Tokyo Toy Museum
activities.reason: Tactile play area with wooden toys in a renovated school building.

activities.name: Fire Museum
activities.reason: Sit in real fire trucks and helicopters. A hands-on delight for toddlers.

itinerary.title: The Mountain Retreat
itinerary.description: Slow pace. Splitting the stay between the lake and the mountains reduces transit time for a toddler.
itinerary.toddlerTip: The 3-Day Hakone Free Pass is essential. Use the Digital Pass for seamless travel with a stroller.

activities.name: Pirate Ship Cruise
activities.reason: A themed boat ride across Lake Ashi that kids will love.

activities.name: Onshi-Hakone Park
activities.reason: Wide, stroller-friendly paths with spectacular views of Mt. Fuji.

activities.name: Hakone Shrine
activities.reason: The famous red torii gate in the water.

activities.name: Dakkoshite! Zoo
activities.reason: A petting zoo specifically designed for small children at Hakone-en.

activities.name: Hakone Ropeway
activities.reason: Gondola ride to the volcanic Owakudani valley.

activities.name: Owakudani (Black Eggs)
activities.reason: Explore volcanic activity and eat eggs cooked in the hot springs.

activities.name: NINJABUS
activities.reason: Amphibious bus tour with an exciting splash into the lake.

activities.name: Hakone Open-Air Museum
activities.reason: Features the 'Net Forest' and 'Zig Zag World' play areas.

activities.name: Gora Park
activities.reason: Beautiful gardens with a large central fountain and greenhouses.

dailyPlan: Day 9: Ropeway to Owakudani & Move to Gora

itinerary.title: The Coastal Break
itinerary.description: Short hop from Hakone. Focus on relaxation and resort facilities.
itinerary.toddlerTip: RISONARE Atami is 'toddler heaven' with ball pools and climbing walls.

activities.name: Marine Spa Atami
activities.reason: All-season water park with pools and slides overlooking the ocean.

activities.name: Acao Forest
activities.reason: Beautiful gardens with a high-up swing and ocean views.

activities.name: Kinomiya Shrine
activities.reason: Home to a 2,000-year-old camphor tree with a cozy cafe.

itinerary.title: The Waterfront Finale
itinerary.description: Odaiba is essentially a giant, pedestrian-friendly 'mall island.'
itinerary.toddlerTip: Legoland Discovery Center and waterfront park views of Rainbow Bridge.

activities.name: Legoland Discovery Center
activities.reason: Indoor Lego-themed attraction perfect for younger kids.

activities.name: teamLab Planets
activities.reason: Sensory art experience. Features the Floating Flower Garden.

activities.name: Toyosu Park
activities.reason: Expansive park with a water play area, perfect for cooling off after teamLab.

activities.name: Odaiba Waterfront Park
activities.reason: Beach-side park with views of the Rainbow Bridge and Statue of Liberty.
